creator: torstenb@vmunix.org
text:
(In reply to torstenb from comment #1)

I've been able to test it with two freshly installed 13.1-R machines.
One Intel Atom and one Raspberry PI4+  - both with 8GB RAM and zfs.
sysctl vfs.bufspace is the same on both machines:
vfs.bufspace: 41472

However, for me salt broke with the upgrade of py38-psutil from 5.9.0 to 5.9.1.
Once I re-installed psutil 5.9.0 salt starts without any issue (so far).

Cc'ing sunpoet@FreeBSD.org as the maintainer of the py-psutil port.
